name: general-counsel-advisor
description: > Legal leadership advisor for General Counsels and senior legal leaders on legal strategy, risk management, contract and commercial governance, regulatory tracking, litigation management, and legal-team operating model. Use when defining a legal strategy, scoring legal risk, auditing the contract portfolio, building a regulatory calendar, or preparing the legal section of a board update.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 面向总法律顾问和高级法务负责人的智能顾问，可协助制定法律战略、评估风险、审查合同组合、搭建合规日历、管理诉讼，以及准备董事会法务汇报材料。
